notes: Effectiveness is measured on local fixtures with PLANTED issues as ground truth. Each fixture provides a fetch-pr.sh-shaped context.json (metadata + diff + annotatedDiff). The reviewer performs the skill's review+score+filter+anchor steps and writes the findings.json array it would post. Graded on: recall of planted issues, anchor validity (comment lands on a real diff line), and false-positive rate. The posting path (post-review.sh) is verified separately by unit test.

evals.prompt: Review this GitHub PR and produce inline review comments. The PR context (metadata + diff + annotatedDiff) has already been fetched into context.json in your working directory. Write the review comments you would post as a JSON array to findings.json.
